session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. Here's a summary of what was done:
## Summary
Consolidated documentation from 9 erk-learn plans into 5 new docs and 3 updated docs:
**New documentation created:** - `docs/learned/planning/incremental-dispatch.md` — commit-level vs PR-level plan embedding, worktree index sync, workflow trigger details - `docs/learned/architecture/health-check-runner-gateway.md` — simplified 3-file gateway pattern, doctor warning display, artifact allowlist - `docs/learned/cli/commands/pr-prepare.md` — impl-context setup for existing PRs, auto-detection, idempotency - `docs/learned/cli/commands/reconcile.md` — merged-branch cleanup, fail-open pipeline, detection/processing/cleanup steps - `docs/learned/architecture/progress-feedback-threading.md` — two-layer threading for LLM progress feedback, time abstraction
**Updated documentation:** - `docs/learned/testing/test-file-organization.md` — added test_preprocess_session precedent (102 tests, 8 files) - `docs/learned/testing/alias-verification-pattern.md` — added well-known library alias exception (pandas, numpy, dagster, matplotlib) - `docs/learned/testing/tripwires.md` — auto-regenerated from updated frontmatter
**PR:** https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8869
